title: Doc RAG Search
problem: Internal knowledge is spread across wikis, docs, and runbooks, so teams spend time hunting for authoritative answers and often rely on outdated tribal memory.
solution: A retrieval-augmented search assistant indexes approved documentation, answers questions with citations, and highlights confidence gaps when sources are stale or conflicting.

impact.notes: Rollout planned for product and engineering; quality tracked via answer acceptance and citation click-through.
